snippet.title: Power of Purpose: featuring Ed Bastian, CEO, Delta Air Lines & Shai Weiss, CEO, Virgin Atlantic
Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian on upcoming summer travel
snippet.description:
The TSA expects a possible record number of travelers to pass through U.S. airports this summer. Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian joins "CBS Mornings" for a closer look at how the airline plans to handle the influx of passengers.

#news #delta #travel 

Each weekday morning, "CBS Mornings” co-hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson bring you the latest breaking news, smart conversation and in-depth feature reporting. "CBS Mornings" airs weekdays at 7 a.m. on CBS and stream it at 8 a.m. ET on the CBS News app.

Subscribe to “CBS Mornings” on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/CBSMornings 
Watch CBS News: http://cbsn.ws/1PlLpZ7c

snippet.title: Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian on record Q2 earnings: Momentum has continued to build
snippet.description:
CNBC’s Phil LeBeau and Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the airline's Q2 earnings results, which posted its highest quarterly revenue and earnings ever thanks to searing travel demand that has defied fears of an economic slowdown for months. snippet.title: Ed Bastian, Delta CEO: Making Travel Magical
snippet.description:
Delta Air Lines is looking to revive the glory days of travel with a premium experience in the sky. Under Ed Bastian, who took over as CEO in 2016, Delta has improved the customer experience and grown revenue, while also navigating the operational challenges microenvironment that comes with running any airline. The result has been double-digit operating margins – a benchmark for major U.S. carriers.

In the latest episode of Exceptional Leaders, Freight Transportation & Airlines analyst Ravi Shanker sits down with Bastian to talk about everything from his advice on making hard decisions, to how it's possible to bring back the golden era of travel while keeping it accessible. https://mgstn.ly/3SDmwRr

snippet.title: Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian Joins The Morning X (INTERVIEW) Part 2 | The Morning X with...
snippet.description:
Leslie is gearing up for a big trip to Germany, so she turns to a true expert for travel advice - Delta CEO Ed Bastian. As CEO of Delta Air Lines, Ed Bastian leads more than 90,000 global professionals who are building the world’s premier international airline, powered by a people-driven, customer-focused culture and spirit of innovation. Part 2 of 2. 


Follow Ed on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/in/edbastian/) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/edbastian/?hl=en) for his thoughts on leadership, culture, aviation and more.


The Morning X with Barnes (https://99xatl.com/crew/barnes/) and Leslie (https://99xatl.com/crew/lesliefram/) - Listen live weekdays 6-10 am Eastern on 99X Atlanta (https://99x.com/) (100.5 on the FM dial in Atlanta), at 99X.com, or in the 99X app (https://t.co/IUFGSlyQgh). The show is a mix of new shows along with "Best of The Morning X" which will be on-demand via this podcast the same day after it airs on 99X. The Morning X originated in 1994 with Barnes, Leslie, and Jimmy.


Please, review and subscribe to The Morning X, available on your favorite podcast network. Get Exclusive Morning X video interviews, video content, and bonus video exclusively from Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/themorningxatl), TikTok (https://www.tiktok.com/@themorningx?_t=8aECQajKmTr&_r=1), Instagram (https://instagram.com/themorningx), or our YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCenGkjVmCmduJnkCGKxccOw). Find all of our social connections at our website TheMorningX.com (http://themorningx.com/)


Sign up for "The Morning X Insiders (https://themorningx.com/)" and be the first to get show announcements, free stuff, and insider information only available to members.


Executive Producer: Steve Barnes


Hosts: Steve Barnes, Leslie Fram


Producer: Matt Courtoy


Producer: Brian Christopher
